response.justification: Candidate has strong general software engineering background with TDD, craftsmanship practices, and polyglot experience, but lacks the core mandatory requirements: substantial C++ development on Windows (only ~6 months at National Instruments in 2014-2015), no SQL Server/Oracle experience evident, and no Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain exposure. Recent work is entirely in TypeScript/Node.js/DLang web and AI tooling, not capital markets C++ systems.
strengths: Solid software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development)
Polyglot experience including some C/C++ exposure at National Instruments
Strong communication skills demonstrated through workshops, talks, and teaching
concerns: Only ~6 months of C++ experience (2014-2015), far below the 5-10 year requirement
No Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain experience
No evidence of SQL Server or Oracle experience, and no Windows platform focus
